title: corispermum uralense subsp. silvicola
intro: Corispermum uralense subsp. silvicola is a plant species in the amaranth family (Amaranthaceae), specifically a subspecies of the Ural caraway (Corispermum uralense), known for its unique properties and medicinal uses. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its reported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to provide several health benefits, including relief from pain, fever reduction, and improved respiratory function. Herbal preparations from Corispermum uralense subsp. silvicola include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
